decisions.title: DB product, hosting, region, backup, RPO/RTO
decisions.g0_resolution: Repo work may implement synthetic-only persistence adapters and migration contracts. Production DB vendor, hosting, region, backup, RPO, and RTO remain owner decisions.

decisions.title: Tenant deployment model
decisions.g0_resolution: Initial Runtime Spine implementation targets synthetic/internal tenant only. Shared SaaS, dedicated tenant, and private cloud edition rules remain owner decisions.

decisions.title: Auth provider and assurance scope
decisions.g0_resolution: Repo work may add provider-neutral AuthN interfaces and local synthetic auth. Production OIDC, SAML, SCIM, MFA, and passkey choices remain owner decisions.

decisions.title: SharePoint and OneDrive topology
decisions.g0_resolution: Vault and M365 work remains export-only, locked, or sandbox-only until topology is approved.

decisions.title: Microsoft Graph scope and admin consent
decisions.g0_resolution: Outlook filing and Graph-backed sync remain locked before admin consent evidence.

decisions.title: Canonical identity separation
decisions.g0_resolution: User, Employee, ExternalUser, Contact, Candidate, and FormerEmployee must be distinct canonical objects with explicit links.

decisions.title: Classification taxonomy
decisions.g0_resolution: Runtime Spine uses public, internal, confidential, restricted, privileged, HR-sensitive, and client-confidential classification envelopes.

decisions.title: Vault initial scope
decisions.g0_resolution: Vault remains export-only for Runtime Spine until import/sync gates and source-of-truth evidence are approved.

decisions.title: runtime_ready boundary and go-live cutoff
decisions.g0_resolution: Runtime-ready candidate requires G6 and RTG-001 through RTG-005. Actual launch/go-live remains a separate owner/external receipt decision.
